nasb.text: When the men of Ashdod saw that it was so, they said, “The ark of the God of Israel must not remain with us, for His hand is severe on us and on Dagon our god.”

esv.text: And when the men of Ashdod saw how things were, they said, “The ark of the God of Israel must not remain with us, for his hand is hard against us and against Dagon our god.”

cnv.text: 亞實突人看見這種情形，就說：“以色列　神的約櫃不可再留在我們這裡，因為他的手重重地加在我們和我們的神大袞身上。”

ccb.text: 亚实突人见此情形，就说：“以色列上帝的约柜不能留在我们这里，因为上帝重重地惩罚我们和我们的大衮神。”
